testsuite.name: Network Layer Integration

testcase.name: should aggregate health status from all components
should discover and transfer blob between two nodes
should track peer events across unified network

testsuite.system-out: 18:17:23.250 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: bJkSigQUQadaCrgBM9XizQ==, expected response: 9yIkWlbpXPPugzeBE8Wm/8XN8Ko= 18:17:23.272 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.maxCapacityPerThread: 4096 18:17:23.272 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.ratio: 8 18:17:23.272 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.chunkSize: 32 18:17:23.272 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.blocking: false 18:17:23.272 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.batchFastThreadLocalOnly: true 18:17:23.340 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x5e50dd1d, L:/127.0.0.1:55706 - R:/127.0.0.1:55708] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 18:17:23.340 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: bJkSigQUQadaCrgBM9XizQ==, response: 9yIkWlbpXPPugzeBE8Wm/8XN8Ko= Connecting to: ws://127.0.0.1:55730 18:17:35.038 [nioEventLoopGroup-51-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: SyfVyvB/IMiuwGBvamvYzQ==, expected response: 73iiTRWsa/MidHDJejQOSjHRGWk= 18:17:35.043 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x01f88d20, L:/127.0.0.1:55730 - R:/127.0.0.1:51240] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 18:17:35.044 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: SyfVyvB/IMiuwGBvamvYzQ==, response: 73iiTRWsa/MidHDJejQOSjHRGWk= Connection successful
